title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5M SEC settlement
summary: A judge has approved Elon Musk's $1.5 million settlement with the SEC, concluding his long-running dispute over inadequate disclosure of his growing stake in Twitter (now X). The settlement ends a regulatory battle between the tech billionaire and the agency.
content: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.

zh.title: 尽管有"疑虑"，法官批准了埃隆·马斯克与美国证交会的150万美元和解案
zh.summary: 一名法官批准了埃隆·马斯克与美国证交会达成的150万美元和解协议，结束了他长期以来关于没有充分披露他在Twitter（现为X）中不断增长股份的争议。该和解协议终结了这位科技亿万富翁与该机构之间的监管纠纷。

title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
summary: AI software company Lovable is in talks to raise $300 million in a funding round that would nearly double its valuation to $13.2 billion, with Menlo Ventures expected to lead. The investment reflects continued investor confidence in AI-powered development tools.
content: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

zh.title: 据报道Lovable正在谈判将其估值翻倍至132亿美元
zh.summary: AI软件公司Lovable正在进行融资谈判，拟融资3亿美元，预计将其估值几乎翻倍至132亿美元，Menlo Ventures预计将领投此轮融资。该投资反映了投资者对AI驱动的开发工具的持续信心。

title: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
summary: Meta is developing prototype always-on smart glasses with "super sensing" capabilities that could continuously record audio and capture photos every few seconds, allowing users to query Meta AI about the data. Raw footage may not be stored or accessible to users, with only metadata retained.
content:
Meta might be the next company to make an always-on AI wearable. The company is working on prototype "super sensing" always-aware smart glasses that could continuously record audio and snap photos "every few seconds," according to the Financial Times. The wearer could then ask Meta AI about the captured audio and images.
However, the images and audio might not be directly available to the user. Here's how the FT describes one way the glasses could use the data:
In one proposed system, raw footage and audio would not be stored by Meta or made available to the user, several people said. Instead, the metadata from that audio and images would …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta据称正在开发将持续录制的智能眼镜
zh.summary: Meta正在开发原型"超级感知"智能眼镜，可以连续记录音频并每隔几秒捕捉一次照片，允许用户向Meta AI查询数据。原始视频可能不会被存储或用户无法访问，仅保留元数据。

title: Feds demand autonomous vehicle companies stop interfering with first responders
summary: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has ordered autonomous vehicle companies to cease interfering with emergency responders, stating that emergency scenes should not be treated as "edge cases." The directive addresses safety concerns where self-driving vehicles may obstruct first responders.
content: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said emergency scenes are not "edge cases."

zh.title: 联邦政府要求自动驾驶汽车公司停止干扰急救人员
zh.summary: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局命令自动驾驶汽车公司停止干扰紧急救援人员，声称紧急情况不应被视为"边界情况"。该指令针对自动驾驶汽车可能阻碍急救人员的安全问题。

title: Suspecting AI cheating, Ivy League prof ordered an in-person final; scores fell 50%
summary: An Ivy League professor ordered in-person exams after suspecting widespread AI cheating, resulting in a dramatic 50% drop in student scores. The incident underscores growing concerns about academic integrity as AI tools become increasingly accessible to students.
content: AI cheating leads to "a failed society," professor says.

zh.title: 怀疑AI作弊，常春藤教授要求进行现场期末考试；成绩下降50%
zh.summary: 一位常春藤教授在怀疑广泛的AI作弊后要求进行现场考试，导致学生成绩急剧下降50%。这一事件强调了随着AI工具对学生越来越容易获得而引发的学术诚信问题。

title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
summary: Google's deepfake detection system successfully identified and debunked an AI-generated image falsely depicting Senator Mitch McConnell in severe hospital distress. The incident demonstrates the growing importance of synthetic media detection tools as deepfakes become more sophisticated.
content: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

zh.title: Google深度伪造检测系统成功揭露麦康奈尔虚假照片
zh.summary: Google的深度伪造检测系统成功识别并揭露了一张虚假的人工智能生成图像,该图像虚假描绘了参议员米奇·麦康奈尔处于严重医院困境中的情景。该事件表明,随着深度伪造变得越来越复杂,合成媒体检测工具的重要性日益增长。

title: With EU backing, QuantumDiamonds aims to speed up chip manufacturing
summary: German startup QuantumDiamonds, supported by EU funding under the European Chips Act, is developing novel chip inspection technology to accelerate semiconductor manufacturing. The company represents the EU's strategy to strengthen domestic chip production through subsidies and innovation.
content: Like its U.S. counterpart, the European Chips Act aims to foster the semiconductor industry — in part thanks to state subsidies. One of the beneficiaries is QuantumDiamonds, a German startup that applies a novel approach to inspecting chips.

zh.title: 获欧盟支持,QuantumDiamonds致力于加快芯片制造
zh.summary: 德国初创公司QuantumDiamonds在欧盟《欧洲芯片法案》的资金支持下,正在开发新颖的芯片检测技术以加快半导体制造。该公司代表了欧盟通过补贴和创新来加强国内芯片生产的战略。

title: Autonomous drone delivery startup Manna plots major US expansion
summary: Autonomous drone delivery company Manna is launching a U.S. operations and manufacturing facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma that will eventually employ 1,000 people. The expansion represents a major scaling of Manna's autonomous delivery operations in the American market.
content: Manna is launching a U.S. operations and manufacturing facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma, that will eventually employ 1,000 people.

zh.title: 自主无人机快递公司Manna计划重大美国扩张
zh.summary: 自主无人机快递公司Manna正在俄克拉荷马州塔尔萨市启动美国运营和制造工厂,最终将雇用1,000人。此次扩张代表了Manna在美国市场自主快递业务的重大规模扩张。

title: Get a $30 credit when you reserve Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy phones
summary: Samsung is offering a $30 store credit to customers who reserve upcoming Galaxy Z Fold and Z Flip phones ahead of the July 22 Galaxy Unpacked event. The credit must be applied to accessories and services at checkout, not toward the phone's purchase price.
content:
Even though they haven’t been officially announced yet, Samsung is giving you a chance to save some cash when you preorder what we’re expecting to be the brand’s updated Galaxy Z Fold phones. The next Galaxy Unpacked event will take place on July 22nd, 2026, and features the tagline “A new shape unfolds.” In addition to seeing updated versions of the existing Flip and Fold form factors, we anticipate the debut of a new, wider foldable phone. If you register your interest ahead of time and end up preordering one of the new phones shortly after they’re announced, Samsung will give you a $30 store credit at checkout.
There are some caveats to this offer. You have to use the credit when you preorder the phone. No saving it for later. Also, the credit can’t be applied to the cost of the phone either, so you’ll have to put it towards the cost of accessories or extra services. Samsung specifically calls out that select Galaxy rings, earbuds, watches, and tablets are eligible, or you can use it to help pay for Samsung Care Plus.
There are no downsides to registering your interest, so if you think you might be interested in buying one of the upcoming phones, it’s worth filling out the form. As long as you use the same email during checkout, the credit will be automatically applied.

zh.title: 预购三星即将推出的Galaxy手机可获得$30额度
zh.summary: 三星向预购即将推出的Galaxy Z Fold和Z Flip手机的客户提供$30店铺额度，需在7月22日Galaxy Unpacked活动前进行。该额度只能用于配件和服务结账时使用，不能用于手机购买价格。

title: Lawsuit: Man used Grok to make 7K sex images of stepdaughter, then shot himself
summary: A lawsuit alleges a man used X's Grok AI system to generate approximately 7,000 explicit sexual images of his stepdaughter, prompting additional CSAM complaints against the platform. The case raises critical questions about X's content moderation safeguards against child exploitation.
content: More young girls sue X over Grok CSAM; X accused of shielding child predators.

zh.title: 诉讼：男子用Grok生成7千张继女不雅照片后自杀

summary: xAI has released Grok 4.5, with Elon Musk positioning it as an "Opus-class model" that offers a more affordable and efficient alternative to other high-powered AI systems. The new version aims to deliver comparable performance while reducing operational costs.
content: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
summary: Roost is a social media app that deliberately slows down communication to carrier pigeon speeds, attracting 300,000 users as an alternative to fast-paced online platforms.
content: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.

title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
summary: General Intuition is using millions of hours of video game data to train foundation models for physical AI, potentially enabling more efficient robot development without extensive real-world data.
content: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

title: Judge rejects Kalshi attempt to override New York state gambling laws
summary: A judge has rejected prediction market platform Kalshi's attempt to circumvent New York state gambling laws, according to the state's governor. The ruling reaffirms the applicability of existing gambling regulations to Kalshi's operations.

title: Google pays $250K for Linux vulnerability allowing guest VM escapes
summary: Google has paid $250,000 for the disclosure of Linux vulnerabilities that allow untrusted users to gain root privileges and escape guest virtual machines. The flaws represent critical security risks in virtualization environments.

title: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
summary: Microsoft's Xbox restructuring includes 3,200 layoffs and studio closures; Obsidian Entertainment will now develop a new Fallout game instead of the planned Avowed sequel, part of the company's refocus on priority projects.
content:
As part of Microsoft's big Xbox "reset," which includes layoffs affecting 3,200 staffers, jettisoning studios, and shifting investments to focus on "higher priority projects," Obsidian Entertainment is changing its plans. The studio, behind games like Grounded and The Outer Worlds, is starting work on a new Fallout title and has canceled "multiple projects," including a sequel to last year's Avowed, according to Bloomberg.
Despite the success of the Fallout TV show, which is getting a third season, Xbox hasn't released a new game in the series since 2018's Fallout 76. Josh Sawyer, Obsidian's studio design director, will head up the new Fall …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软Xbox重组调整Obsidian转向开发Fallout而非Avowed

title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
summary: X will now notify users via direct message when posts they've engaged with receive Community Notes corrections, aiming to address concerns that fact-checking arrives too late to prevent misinformation spread.
content: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
summary: Google Photos introduces Video Remix, an AI tool that enables users to enhance videos through cinematic relighting, background replacement, and artistic styling.
content: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

title: America’s cheapest new EV is smaller than a ping-pong table and tops out at 19mph
summary: Fiat's Topolino is America's most affordable new EV at $13,995, but requires significant tradeoffs with a top speed of just 19mph and 46-mile range, making it more of a micromobility vehicle than a traditional car.
content:
When searching for an affordable electric vehicle these days, there are always tradeoffs. How much range are you willing to sacrifice, how much leg room and storage space, how many features, in the pursuit of that magic sticker price that won't break the bank?
The Fiat Topolino is basically the ultimate embodiment of those tradeoffs. For the dirt cheap price of $13,995, you get a top speed of 19mph, an all-electric range of 46 miles, and a wheelbase that's barely longer than one and a half king mattresses. In fact, the Topolino is less of a car and more of a micromobility vehicle.
Fiat isn't trying to hide that fact. In it's announcement t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美国最便宜的新电动车比乒乓球桌还小，最高时速只有19英里
zh.summary: 菲亚特Topolino是美国最便宜的新电动车，售价13,995美元，但存在重大权衡，最高时速仅为19英里，续航里程46英里，使其更像是一辆微型出行工具而非传统汽车。

title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
summary: A CEO argues that video game data is superior to internet data for training AI systems capable of understanding physical movement and space—skills large language models like ChatGPT lack but are essential for artificial general intelligence.
content: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]

title: Cockroaches will learn to fear my SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable
summary: The SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable is a $34 robotic device that attaches to light switches and can be controlled remotely, allowing users to turn on lights before entering dark rooms—a practical pest deterrent solution.
content:
A little robotic switch-flipper has become my sidekick in combating cockroaches. Before I got the SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable, I'd tiptoe through the dark every morning, hoping I wouldn't step on one of those terrible bugs scurrying around as I made my way to the light switch across the room. Now I'm ready for battle before I even enter the room because I can switch it on from afar, thanks to the $33.99 SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable. 
The small gadget attaches via adhesive near a switch or button and uses its tiny robotic arm to physically press or pull it for you. You can automate anything with physical power buttons, from coffee makers, light …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: If Microsoft sold off Xbox, who would even buy it?
summary: Microsoft's Xbox division faces an uncertain future following massive restructuring: 3,200 total layoffs and four studio closures signal leadership believes the platform is "not healthy" and strategically unfocused.
content:
This week, Microsoft took a huge ax to its Xbox business. The company announced that it would be laying off 1,600 workers now, 1,600 more over the next fiscal year, and that it would be shedding four studios. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma hasn't been shy about why she's making such dramatic cuts, saying in a memo that the business is "not healthy." Speaking to Fortune, she said that "we simply spread ourselves too thin."
Given the scale of the changes and Xbox's currently vague strategy of focusing only on big games, it's unclear just what the future of the platform is. As Microsoft invests much of its resources into everything AI, a struggling cons …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro is a great travel companion, and it’s on sale for $40
summary: The Twelve South AirFly Pro, on sale for $39.99, is a Bluetooth adapter that enables wireless headphones to work with airplane entertainment systems and supports dual headphones plus extended battery life for long flights.
content:
Twelve South’s AirFly Pro is just $5 more than the SE model. | Image: Twelve South	

If you’ve got a summer trip coming up, the last-gen Twelve South AirFly Pro is one of those gadgets that can make a long flight feel a little shorter. It lets you use your wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems, and right now it’s on sale for $39.99 ($15 off) at Amazon. That’s the best price we’ve seen all year and just $7 shy of the all-time low we last saw in January 2025.
Twelve South AirFly Pro

Where to Buy:

 $54.99 $39.99 at Amazon

For just $5 more than the AirFly SE, the Pro adds a handful of useful extras, one of which is support for both Bluetooth transmitter and receiver modes. That means you can use your wireless headphones with an airplane’s entertainment system during a flight, then stream music from your phone to compatible wired speakers and sound systems once you’ve landed. 
Unlike the SE, it also supports two pairs of Bluetooth headphones at once, so you can share a movie or podcast with a travel companion. Plus, its 25 hour battery life should be enough to last through even the longest international flights.
The AirFly Pro is useful in other ways, too. During your vacation, you can use it to connect your preferred music streaming service to an older rental car stereo, or your ear buds to a Nintendo Switch. Once you’re back home, it can also connect your wireless headphones to compatible gym equipment and other devices with a standard 3.5mm audio jack.

zh.title: Twelve South的AirFly Pro是很好的旅行伴侣,现在以$40优惠价出售
zh.summary: Twelve South AirFly Pro(售价$39.99)是一款蓝牙适配器,可使无线耳机与飞机娱乐系统兼容,支持双耳机配对和长途飞行时的扩展电池续航。

title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
summary: OpenAI has released new voice models enabling simultaneous speaking and listening, improving conversational naturalness and supporting real-time translation. The advancement addresses a key limitation in current voice AI systems.
content: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

zh.title: OpenAI发布新的语音模型以实现更自然的实时对话
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了新的语音模型，支持同时说话和听音，提高了对话的自然性并支持实时翻译。这一进步解决了当前语音AI系统的一个关键限制。

title: Venus Aerospace raises $90M Series B to build a new kind of rocket engine
summary: Venus Aerospace has secured $90 million in Series B funding to develop a new rocket engine technology. The investment reflects growing momentum in next-generation propulsion systems for commercial spaceflight.
content: Build a new kind of rocket engine, and the world will beat a path to your door.

zh.title: Venus Aerospace融资9000万美元B轮，开发新型火箭发动机
zh.summary: Venus Aerospace获得9000万美元B轮融资，用于开发新型火箭发动机技术。这笔投资反映了商业航天下一代推进系统日益增长的势头。

title: Blue Origin reportedly raising $10B at $130B valuation
summary: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from investors including Coatue Asset Management and Jeff Bezos. The funding round represents the company's first major private capital raise.
content: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself and other big-name investors, the New York Times reported.

zh.title: 蓝色起源据悉以1300亿美元估值融资100亿美元
zh.summary: 蓝色起源正从包括Coatue资产管理公司和杰夫·贝索斯在内的投资者融资100亿美元，估值为1300亿美元。这轮融资代表该公司首次进行大规模私人资本融资。

title: Venus Williams-backed WeWard can now lock your apps until you hit your steps
summary: WeWard, a French app backed by tennis star Venus Williams, now features app-locking functionality that restricts access until users meet their daily step goals. The app claims to increase walking time by nearly 25% among users.
content: With funding from tennis star and angel investor Venus Williams, the French app WeWard says that it increases walking time by almost 25%.

zh.title: 由维纳斯·威廉姆斯支持的WeWard可锁定应用直到达成步数目标
zh.summary: 由网球明星维纳斯·威廉姆斯支持的法国应用WeWard现已推出应用锁定功能，在用户达成日步数目标前限制应用访问。该应用声称可将用户行走时间增加近25%。

title: Fi’s Starlink-enabled pet tracker found my dog when LTE couldn’t
summary: Fi Ultra is the first commercially available pet tracker with Starlink satellite connectivity, adding failover coverage to GPS and LTE for tracking pets in cellular dead zones across the US. The device costs $199 but carries relatively poor battery life compared to traditional pet trackers.
content:
Gus, the wirehaired pointing griffon, models the Fi Ultra while overlooking Charleston Harbor.	

Fi Ultra is the first Starlink-enabled pet tracker you can buy. It expands on GPS and LTE trackers, adding automatic failover to T-Mobile's T-Satellite-branded direct-to-cell service when venturing into cellular dead zones. That lets owners tap into SpaceX's constellation of low Earth orbit Starlink satellites to track their pets anywhere in the US. But it comes with a few tradeoffs based on our early testing, including relatively poor battery life for a pet tracker.
Built to fit "adventure dogs of any size," according to the company, the Fi Ultra is designed to be compatible with the dog collar or harness you already use. It costs $199 for …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Fi的Starlink卫星宠物追踪器在LTE无法工作时找到了我的狗
zh.summary: Fi Ultra是第一款具有Starlink卫星连接功能的商用宠物追踪器,为GPS和LTE增加了故障转移覆盖,可在美国蜂窝覆盖不足的区域追踪宠物。该设备价格为199美元,但与传统宠物追踪器相比电池续航时间较短。

title: Blue Origin, for the first time, is expected to raise private capital
summary: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion in private capital at a $130 billion valuation, marking the company's first significant private funding round. The capital injection strengthens the spaceflight company's position in commercial space development.
content: The company is raising $10 billion, leading to a valuation of $130 billion.

zh.title: Blue Origin首次预计募集私人资本
zh.summary: Blue Origin正在以130亿美元估值募集100亿美元私人资本,这是该公司首次重大私募融资。这笔资本注入加强了该航天公司在商业航天开发中的地位。

title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
summary: Former OpenAI executive Kevin Weil has joined the board of Stoke Space, a company developing reusable rocket technology. His appointment signals growing investor interest in reusable rocket systems among Silicon Valley tech leaders.
content: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.

zh.title: 前OpenAI高管Kevin Weil现已加入Stoke Space董事会
zh.summary: 前OpenAI高管Kevin Weil已加入开发可重用火箭技术的公司Stoke Space的董事会。他的任命表明硅谷科技领袖对可重用火箭系统的投资兴趣不断增长。

title: The Steam Machine fits my TV, my desk, and my life
summary: Valve's Steam Machine gaming console integrates with the broader Steam ecosystem, offering access to hundreds of PC games and cross-device cloud saves at a $1,049 price point. Despite documented drawbacks, the device appeals to players with extensive Steam libraries seeking console gaming options.
content:
For the last couple weeks, I've been in an extremely lucky position: I've been spending a lot of time playing games on Valve's Steam Machine. 
We gave the Steam Machine a 6, and I don't disagree with my colleague Sean Hollister's review. But even though I already own a PS5 and an Xbox Series X, and even though I've experienced the Steam Machine's drawbacks for myself, I would spend the $1,049 to buy one right now. 
My PS5 and Xbox Series X can't play the hundreds of games in my growing Steam library, don't support Steam's cloud saves that let me seamlessly carry progress between my Steam Deck and Steam Machine, don't support my beloved Ste …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Steam Machine 融入我的电视、书桌和生活
zh.summary: Valve的Steam Machine游戏主机与更广泛的Steam生态系统集成，以1,049美元的价格提供数百款PC游戏和跨设备云存储的访问权限。尽管存在已知的缺点，该设备对拥有庞大Steam库的玩家很有吸引力，这些玩家正在寻求游戏主机选项。

title: The robotaxi law that could ban Tesla
summary: New Jersey lawmakers are drafting legislation to settle a fundamental autonomous vehicle debate: whether cameras alone suffice for safe self-driving or if additional sensors like lidar and radar are legally required. The bill could significantly impact Tesla's camera-only approach to autonomous driving.
content:
For more than a decade, one question has loomed over the race to build autonomous vehicles: Are cameras alone enough to safely replace human drivers, or do truly driverless cars need additional, overlapping sensors like lidar and radar to navigate the world reliably? Tesla has bet billions of dollars that artificial intelligence and cameras are sufficient. Nearly every other major autonomous vehicle developer has gone the opposite direction.
Until now, that argument has largely been left to executives and engineers. New Jersey lawmakers are trying to settle it in state law.
A bill expected to come up for a vote later this year would requir …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 可能禁止特斯拉的机器人出租车法律
zh.summary: 新泽西州立法者正在起草立法，以解决一个基本的自动驾驶辩论：仅摄像头是否足以实现安全的自动驾驶，或者法律上是否需要激光雷达和雷达等额外传感器。该法案可能会对特斯拉仅摄像头的自动驾驶方法产生重大影响。

title: Samsung will launch its new wide foldable on July 22nd
summary: Samsung announced its Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22nd to unveil a new wider foldable phone designed to compete with devices like Huawei's Pura X Max. The company will introduce a third foldable format that is shorter and wider than its existing book-style models, alongside updated versions of its Flip and Fold phones.
content:
Samsung has announced that its next Galaxy Unpacked launch event will be held on July 22nd, with the tagline: "A new shape unfolds."
It's long been rumored that Samsung is about to expand its foldable phone line to a third format, with a shorter and wider version of its big book-style foldables, to match Huawei's Pura X Max and Apple's expected foldable iPhone. Today's announcement adds to that impression, showing a tall ticket with the stub torn off, leaving it shorter than before.
Alongside the wider foldable, Samsung is expected to announce updated versions of its existing Flip and Fold phones, with the latter potentially rebranded to t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星将在7月22日推出新型宽屏可折叠手机
zh.summary: 三星宣布将在7月22日举办Galaxy Unpacked活动，推出一款更宽的可折叠手机，旨在与华为Pura X Max等设备竞争。该公司将推出第三种可折叠格式，相比现有的书本式型号更短更宽，同时还会推出更新版本的Flip和Fold手机。

title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
summary: ZML, a French AI startup backed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has released ZML/LLMD software designed to reduce the cost of running AI inference across different chip architectures. The free tool aims to make AI model execution more efficient and accessible.
content: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

zh.title: 法国热门初创公司ZML发布免费产品以加速多种AI芯片的推理
zh.summary: 由图灵奖得主杨立昆支持的法国AI初创公司ZML发布了ZML/LLMD软件，旨在降低在不同芯片架构上运行AI推理的成本。这个免费工具致力于使AI模型执行更高效和更容易获得。

title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
summary: AI chip maker SambaNova announced a new funding round at an $11 billion valuation, raising approximately $1 billion just five months after its previous mega-round. The timing follows reports that Intel had considered acquiring the company for roughly $1.6 billion.
content: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

zh.title: AI芯片制造商SambaNova以110亿美元估值融资10亿美元，距离上次大融资仅5个月
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商SambaNova宣布以110亿美元估值进行新一轮融资，融资额约为10亿美元，距其上次大型融资仅五个月。这个时机之后出现了英特尔曾考虑以约16亿美元收购该公司的报道。

title: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
summary: Security researchers have identified a vulnerability called "HalluSquatting" that exploits AI tools' inability to refuse requests, allowing hackers to weaponize nine of the most popular AI platforms to assemble massive botnets. This technique represents a significant security risk for organizations using these AI services.
content: "HalluSquatting" weaponizes LLMs' inability to say "I don't know."

zh.title: 黑客可以利用9个最受欢迎的AI工具组建大规模僵尸网络
zh.summary: 安全研究人员发现了一个名为"HalluSquatting"的漏洞，该漏洞利用AI工具无法拒绝请求的缺陷，使黑客能够利用九个最受欢迎的AI平台来组建大规模僵尸网络。这种技术对使用这些AI服务的组织构成了重大安全风险。
